name: Mexican Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Quaker Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine oats, parsley, and seasonings. Blend for about 1 minute, stopping occasionally to stir.
3. Coat each chicken breast with the oat mixture.
4. Place the coated chicken breasts on a rack in a 15 x 10-inch jelly roll pan.
5. Gently brush the entire surface of each chicken breast with melted margarine.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the juices run clear when pierced with a fork.
7. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and mix well.
8. Serve the sauce over the cooked chicken. Makes 4 servings.
